ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the match was played */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the match took place */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played in the season */,
  "num_players" INTEGER /* Number of players participating in the match */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Mode of the game (e.g., 5v5, 1v1) */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., regular season, playoff, tournament) */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map where the match was played */,
  "spectator_count" INTEGER /* Number of spectators during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population_2019" REAL /* Population of the country in the year 2019 */,
  "population_2020" REAL /* Population of the country in the year 2020 */,
  "population_2021" REAL /* Population of the country in the year 2021 */,
  "esports_growth_rate_2019_2020" REAL /* Growth rate of the esports scene from 2019 to 2020 */,
  "esports_growth_rate_2020_2021" REAL /* Growth rate of the esports scene from 2020 to 2021 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the player */,
  "pro_players_per_million" REAL /* Number of professional players per million inhabitants */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the professional scene */,
  "retirement_date" TEXT /* Date when the player retired (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player in the match */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match played */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills by the player in the match */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths by the player in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player in the match */,
  "damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Total damage dealt by the player in the match */,
  "healing_done" INTEGER /* Total healing done by the player in the match */,
  "gold_earned" INTEGER /* Total gold earned by the player in the match */,
  "level_reached" INTEGER /* Level reached by the player at the end of the match */,
  "wards_placed" INTEGER /* Number of wards placed by the player in the match */,
  "wards_destroyed" INTEGER /* Number of enemy wards destroyed by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "total_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams participating in the season */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played in the season */,
  "top_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the top-performing team in the season */,
  "top_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the top-performing player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the team */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins by the team */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses by the team */,
  "total_matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the team */,
  "total_draws" INTEGER /* Total number of matches that ended in a draw */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team (e.g., 3 points for a win, 1 point for a draw) */,
  "average_match_duration" REAL /* Average duration of matches played by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the account holder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, coach) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object listing the permissions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match played */,
  "winning_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "losing_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match took place */,
  "match_score" TEXT /* Score of the match (e.g., 3-2, 2-1) */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the match went into overtime */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., regular season, playoff, tournament) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_winning_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("winning_team_id") REFERENCES team_stats ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_losing_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("losing_team_id") REFERENCES team_stats ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match related to the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* The content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., analysis, fan feedback) */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_comments_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_viewing_stats" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewing statistic record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match being viewed */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total count of views for the match */,
  "unique_viewers" INTEGER /* Number of unique viewers for the match */,
  "average_view_duration" REAL /* Average duration viewers watched the match */,
  "peak_viewers" INTEGER /* Peak number of concurrent viewers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_viewing_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player receiving the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., performance, community) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the member belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player in the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the team (e.g., captain, player, analyst) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date when the player left the team (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES team_stats ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
